Combine evidence to make deductions that unlock new locations and advance the story. Connect disparate clues to uncover the truth behind the Redhorn family secrets and bring the killer to justice. Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and menu options Space: Interact with objects, select menu items, advance dialogue Z: Open/close inventory and deduction menu Shift: Skip dialogue text Enter: Start game ESC: Pause/unpause game R: Restart game Basic navigation and interaction test. Validates that the player can move between locations, interact with objects, and collect clues. Tests the fundamental mechanics of the point-and-click adventure gameplay. Navigate through available locations using arrow keys. Interact with highlighted objects using Space. Collect at least 3 clues by examining different objects. Verify that clues are added to inventory and the game state updates correctly. Successfully navigate to multiple locations, interact with objects, and collect clues. Inventory should contain collected clues. No errors or stuck states. Game remains responsive to inputs throughout the test. Win condition test that plays through the entire game optimally. Tests the complete narrative flow, all deduction puzzles, and verifies the win condition is achievable. This validates the entire game loop from start to finish. Follow the optimal path through the mystery: collect all necessary clues in each chapter, make correct deductions by combining evidence, interview all suspects, and solve each puzzle in sequence. Navigate efficiently between locations and use deduction menu to progress the story. Complete all chapters and reach GAME_OVER_WIN state. All deductions are solved correctly, the killer is identified, and the final narrative conclusion is reached. Game state shows victory condition with appropriate win message. Dialogue and suspect interview test. Validates that the dialogue system works correctly, suspects can be interviewed, and information is properly conveyed to the player. Verify that successful deductions unlock new content and progress the chapter. Deduction puzzles can be completed by combining correct clues. Successful deductions unlock new locations or advance chapters. Invalid combinations are rejected with appropriate feedback. Game progression gates work correctly. Chapter progression and location unlock test. Validates that chapters progress in correct order and new locations unlock based on story events. Tests the linear narrative structure and gating mechanics. Complete objectives in Chapter 1 to unlock Chapter 2. Verify that locked locations become accessible after meeting requirements. Redhorn Family Detective

Guide Edward, a young detective, through a murder mystery in a small town. Examine objects, collect clues, and interview suspects to solve the case. Combine evidence to make deductions that unlock new locations and advance the story. Connect disparate clues to uncover the truth behind the Redhorn family secrets and bring the killer to justice.

Controls:
Arrow Keys: Navigate between locations and menu options
Space: Interact with objects, select menu items, advance dialogue
Z: Open/close inventory and deduction menu
Shift: Skip dialogue text
Enter: Start game | ESC: Pause/unpause | R: Restart game
